title: Lattice — the full grid of cells for one project
description: Canonical state in .harness/lattice.json; every other view (status renders, the frontier) is derived. See references/agentic-systems-foundations/lattice-model.md.

version.description: Schema/format version of this lattice file.

project.description: Human label for the project this lattice governs.

created.description: ISO-8601 creation timestamp (stamped by the seed operation).

frontier_scope.description: The current frontier of the trajectory — the largest scope at which the slice has validated footholds. The compass scans the modality axis at this scope.

cells.description: The cells of the lattice. Each is a Cell (cell.schema.json).
